source: Playwright Electron recording with phase metadata and continuous FFmpeg camera motion

demos.name: workbench
demos.goal: Open README.md from the workspace home with Quick open.
demos.outcome: README.md opens in the document workbench with Preview visible.

demos.name: guide-split
demos.goal: Move beta.md to the right of alpha.md.
demos.outcome: Both documents remain visible in a left-right split.

demos.name: split
demos.goal: Move the Terminal Pane from below the document to its right.
demos.outcome: The document and terminal settle into a left-right layout without losing the shell session.

demos.name: search
demos.goal: Find a phrase across the project and open its result.
demos.outcome: docs/review.md opens from the selected body-search result.

demos.name: diff
demos.goal: Review a changed Markdown document in rendered Diff.
demos.outcome: Rendered changes and their matching Changes summary are visible together.

demos.name: terminal
demos.goal: Open a real shell session and run one project command.
demos.outcome: The shell output appears in the terminal beside the project document.
